name: Company or business entity incorporation (DCIP)
notes: Supported by the Black Book licence record's applicability to formal business organisations. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Formal business entities register with the Department of Companies and Intellectual Property, and private companies file annual returns.
appliesWhen: On formation of a formal business entity, and annually thereafter for the annual return.

name: ZIMRA taxpayer registration
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to individuals, companies, partnerships and cooperatives starting a business. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: New businesses register with ZIMRA through TaRMS within the period stated in ZIMRA's new-trader guidance.

name: VAT registration and returns (ZIMRA)
notes: Applicability and return cadences per the Black Book records; the current registration threshold is deliberately not restated here — confirm with ZIMRA. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Persons trading in taxable supplies who meet the compulsory registration rules register for VAT and file returns for their assigned tax period.
appliesWhen: When the business meets the current compulsory VAT registration rules; returns per assigned tax period thereafter.

name: Employer (PAYE) registration and remittance (ZIMRA)
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to businesses that become employers. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Businesses that become employers register for PAYE, remit monthly, and file the annual ITF 16 return.
appliesWhen: On becoming an employer; monthly remittance and annual return thereafter.

name: NSSA employer registration and POBS contributions
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to employers of labour. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Employers of labour register with NSSA and remit Pensions and Other Benefits Scheme contributions monthly.
appliesWhen: On becoming an employer of labour; monthly remittance thereafter.

name: Effluent discharge licensing (EMA)
notes: Directly supported: the Black Book record's applicability expressly covers industrial and mining operations discharging effluent, and the quarterly reporting event names mining licence holders. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Industrial and mining operations discharging effluent require an EMA effluent licence and submit quarterly waste-management reports.
appliesWhen: When the operation discharges effluent; quarterly reporting while licensed.

name: ESIA certificate for mining projects (EMA)
notes: Whether a specific mining project is in an EMA-listed category must be confirmed against EMA's current prescribed list. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Mining projects in EMA-listed categories with potential negative environmental effects require an ESIA certificate before implementation, with quarterly progress reports and renewal rules while conditions apply.
appliesWhen: Before implementing a project in an EMA-listed category; ongoing reporting per certificate conditions.

name: Electricity generation licence (ZERA)
notes: The Black Book record covers electricity-generation activities requiring a ZERA licence; whether a specific captive-power arrangement is licensable must be confirmed with ZERA. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Electricity-generation activities requiring a ZERA licence must be licensed before operation.
appliesWhen: If the mine undertakes electricity-generation activities that fall within ZERA's licensable categories (for example captive power).

name: PRAZ supplier registration for public-entity supply
notes: Directly supported by the Black Book record's applicability to suppliers seeking public-procurement eligibility. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Mining businesses supplying goods or services to public entities register with PRAZ as suppliers/bidders and renew annually.
appliesWhen: Before bidding to supply public entities.

name: Business membership bodies relevant to mining
notes: Membership is voluntary. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Mining businesses may voluntarily join cross-sector bodies such as ZNCC and the employers' confederation EMCOZ; the sector chamber is recorded as a gap below.

name: Mining titles, claims and leases (Ministry of Mines)
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Prospecting, claim registration, mining leases and title inspections under the Mines and Minerals framework are not yet evidenced by Black Book records.

name: Mineral marketing and royalty obligations
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Mineral-specific marketing channels (for example the state gold buyer and the minerals marketing corporation) and royalty/levy regimes are not yet evidenced by Black Book records; no channel or rate is asserted.

name: Explosives and blasting licensing
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Licensing for the storage, transport and use of explosives in mining is not yet evidenced by a Black Book record.

name: Mine health and safety inspection regime
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Statutory mine inspection, mine-manager appointments and accident-reporting obligations are not yet evidenced by Black Book records.

name: Chamber of Mines membership
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: The mining sector chamber is not yet represented in the Black Book's business associations.
